All Slides (7)

1 Here’s how to make fufu
2 Cassava first, plantain optional
3 Peel, core, and chop
4 Blend with a little water
5 Cook and stir until stretchy
6 Shape and serve warm

Caption

Fufu tutorial: here’s a simple way to make it at home with cassava as the base. Green plantain is optional. Peel, blend, cook, then stir until smooth and stretchy. Save this before your next cook day.
#fufu #foodtutorial #westafricanfood #homecooking #pomapp
